items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding external directory links to internal users/subjects. However, there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement, nor are there any prior steps that confirm the existence or functionality of such links. The linked use case mentions the need for these links, but without concrete evidence, the requirement cannot be validated, leading to an inconclusive result.
